memoryArtifacts.headline: Life Sketch of Mrs. Mary Betts   B.  Abt 1596
memoryArtifacts.description:
Mary was born in England, probably about 1596.  She married John Betts.  They had three children that are known;  Mary 1623, Martha 1625, and John 1627.  All were born in England.

     In 1627, M …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary於1580年出生在英國肯特可藍別盧可時，她的父親James Richard Biggs50歲，母親Anne Bigge46歲。她於1596年12月26日與John Betts of Bearsted, Kent在英國英格蘭肯特比阿斯特德結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1647年7月19日在她的家鄉享年67歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特可藍別盧可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary于1580年出生在英国肯特可藍別盧可时，她的父亲James Richard Biggs50岁，母亲Anne Bigge46岁。她于1596年12月26日与John Betts of Bearsted, Kent在英国英格兰肯特比阿斯特德结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1647年7月19日在她的家乡享年67岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特可藍別盧可。

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary was born in 1580, in Cranbrook, Kent, England, her father, James Richard Biggs, was 50 and her mother, Anne Bigge, was 46. She married John Betts of Bearsted, Kent on 26 December 1596, in Bearsted, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 19 July 1647, in her hometown, at the age of 67, and was buried in Cranbrook, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary est née en 1580, à Cranbrook, Kent, Angleterre, son père, James Richard Biggs, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Anne Bigge, avait 46 ans. Elle a épousé John Betts of Bearsted, Kent le 26 décembre 1596, à Bearsted, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 19 juillet 1647, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterrée à Cranbrook, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary 1580 in Cranbrook, Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater James Richard Biggs 50 und ihre Mutter Anne Bigge 46. Sie hat am 26. Dezember 1596 in Bearsted, Kent, England, United Kingdom John Betts of Bearsted, Kent geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 19. Juli 1647 im Alter von 67 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Cranbrook, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary è nata il nel 1580 nel Cranbrook, Kent, England, sua padre, James Richard Biggs, aveva 50 anni e sua madre, Anne Bigge, aveva 46 anni. Lei sposato John Betts of Bearsted, Kent il 26 dicembre 1596, nel Bearsted, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: Maryが1580年にイギリスケントクランブルークで生まれた時，父James Richard Biggsは50歳，母Anne Biggeは46歳であった。1596年12月26日にイギリスイギリスケントビールステドでJohn Betts of Bearsted, Kentと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1647年7月19日に故郷で67歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントクランブルークにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary(이)가 1580년 영국 켄트 크랜브룩에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James Richard Biggs(은)는 50세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne Bigge(은)는 46세였다. 그녀는 1596년 12월 26일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 브이르스테드에서 John Betts of Bearsted, Kent(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1647년 7월 19일 그녀의 고향에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 크랜브룩에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary nasceu em 1580, em Cranbrook, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, James Richard Biggs, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Anne Bigge, tinha 46 anos. Ela casou-se com John Betts of Bearsted, Kent em 26 de dezembro de 1596, em Bearsted, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary родилась в 1580 г. в местности кранбрук, кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени James Richard Biggs было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Bigge, 46. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Betts of Bearsted, Kent 26 декабря 1596 г. в местности бирстед, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла 19 июля 1647 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 67 лет и была похоронена в местности кранбрук, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.
